# 🗺️ Product & Management

> Product strategy, delivery, discovery, and team coordination.

**12 agents** · [← Back to all categories](../../README.md)

| Agent | What it does | Model | Tags |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`experiment-tracker`](experiment-tracker.md) | Designs, runs, and analyzes A/B tests and product experiments with statistical rigor. | 🟡 sonnet | experimentation, ab-testing, statistics, metrics |
| [`feedback-synthesizer`](feedback-synthesizer.md) | Synthesizes user feedback from many channels into clustered, prioritized, decision-ready insight. | 🟡 sonnet | user-feedback, synthesis, voice-of-customer, insights |
| [`product-manager`](product-manager.md) | Owns the product lifecycle end to end — discovery, definition, delivery, and the outcomes that follow. | 🔴 opus | product-management, discovery, prioritization, jtbd |
| [`product-strategist`](product-strategist.md) | Sets product strategy, positioning, and the long-range vision that tells the team where to play and how to win. | 🔴 opus | strategy, positioning, vision, north-star |
| [`project-shepherd`](project-shepherd.md) | Coordinates a cross-functional project from kickoff to delivery, keeping scope, dependencies, and people in sync. | 🟡 sonnet | project-coordination, delivery, dependencies, risk |
| [`roadmap-planner`](roadmap-planner.md) | Builds and sequences product roadmaps across quarters and aligns the stakeholders who depend on them. | 🟡 sonnet | roadmap, planning, sequencing, stakeholder-alignment |
| [`sprint-prioritizer`](sprint-prioritizer.md) | Plans the next sprint and orders the backlog with explicit, defensible prioritization frameworks. | 🟡 sonnet | sprint-planning, prioritization, backlog, rice |
| [`studio-operations`](studio-operations.md) | Optimizes the day-to-day operations and team processes that make delivery repeatable — rituals, tooling, handoffs, and the metrics that reveal where work gets stuck. | 🟡 sonnet | operations, process-improvement, team-process, efficiency |
| [`studio-producer`](studio-producer.md) | Orchestrates a portfolio of projects and the resourcing across them — who works on what, when, and where the constraints bind. | 🟡 sonnet | program-management, resourcing, capacity, portfolio |
| [`trend-researcher`](trend-researcher.md) | Researches markets, competitors, and emerging trends to surface product opportunities and threats. | 🟡 sonnet | market-research, trends, competitive-analysis, opportunity |
| [`user-story-writer`](user-story-writer.md) | Writes clear, testable user stories with crisp acceptance criteria from a feature idea or spec. | 🟢 haiku | user-stories, acceptance-criteria, backlog, requirements |
| [`workflow-architect`](workflow-architect.md) | Maps an end-to-end workflow into a complete tree of states, branches, and edge cases, then turns it into a build-ready specification. | 🔴 opus | workflow, process-mapping, state-machine, specification |
